channel.title: Articles on Raj Duggal
channel.description: Recent content in Articles on Raj Duggal

item.title: But I'm Not a Software Developer
item.description: "But I'm Not a Software Developer" - A Mindset Shift for Team Success

item.title: How to Run a Quick, Simple and Free, Web Accessibility Test Audit
item.description: You don't need to download or install any special software. Both Chrome and the Edge browsers have a built-in web accessibility auditing tool, ready for you to use!

item.title: Identifying the Most Prized Software Features For Maximum Impact
item.description: How to Identify the Most Prized Software Features

item.title: Managing Budget Risks
item.description: Leveraging Agile to Mitigate Budget Overruns and Maximize Business Value

item.title: Stop Nesting All Your Components in your ReactJS Apps
item.description: In ReactJS it's better to pass components as props rather than nesting everything. Here's how to do it!
